---

## 🏆 E-E-A-T Profile: Experience, Expertise, Authoritativeness, and Trustworthiness

Organic Mushroom Farm is built on a foundation of deep agricultural expertise and verifiable success in commercial mushroom cultivation. 

### **Experience (E)**
- We have years of hands-on, commercial experience in cultivating over 10 varieties of mushrooms (Button, Oyster, Milky, Shiitake, Cordyceps).
- Successfully set up multiple industrial-scale climate-controlled mushroom farms across India.
- Trained thousands of aspiring agri-entrepreneurs through our online and offline programs.

### **Expertise (E)**
- **Technical Mastery:** Specialized in using high-grade PPGL PUF panels, Daikin refrigeration systems, custom HVAC, and automated climate controllers for 365-day production.
- **Scientific Cultivation:** We produce and supply only First-Generation (G1) premium quality, contamination-free spawn (seed) cultivated under strict laboratory conditions.
- **Founder:** Led by Tanish Soni, an established expert in climate-controlled mushroom infrastructure and modern agricultural technology. 

### **Authoritativeness (A)**
- Recognized as a leading end-to-end consultant for commercial mushroom projects.
- We provide definitive guidance on Government Subsidies (NHB, MIDH, NABARD) and bank loans (DPR preparation).
- Trusted resource and supplier for B2B wholesalers, local markets, and international exporters.

### **Trustworthiness (T)**
- **Transparent Operations:** Clear pricing, authentic training programs, and transparent farm setup quotations. 
- **Verifiable Location:** Based in Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, with an easily reachable support line (+91 9203544140).
- **Social Proof & Reviews:** Highly rated by thousands of farmers across all 28 states and 8 UTs. 
- **Secure Ecosystem:** Dedicated to providing post-training support and buy-back guidance to ensure genuine success for our partners.

---

## About

Organic Mushroom Farm is a complete mushroom business ecosystem based in Jabalpur, MP, India. We serve four verticals:

1. **Mushroom Spawn (Seed) Supply** — All varieties, bulk & retail, Pan India delivery
2. **Mushroom Farming Training** — Online & Offline, Beginner to Advanced, Hindi & English
3. **Turnkey Farm Setup** — Complete mushroom farm design, installation, and consultation
4. **Fresh & Dry Mushroom Sales** — All varieties, bulk & retail, Pan India & global

We are the trusted source for mushroom farmers, entrepreneurs, homegrowers, and commercial buyers across India and internationally.

---

## Products & Services

### 🌱 Mushroom Spawn (Seed) — All Varieties

We supply high-yield, contamination-free, first-generation (G1) mushroom spawn for all varieties:

- **Oyster Mushroom Spawn** (Pleurotus ostreatus) — White, Pink, Grey, Yellow, Blue Oyster
- **Button Mushroom Spawn** (Agaricus bisporus) — White Button, Brown Cremini
- **Milky Mushroom Spawn** (Calocybe indica) — High-yield tropical variety
- **Shiitake Mushroom Spawn** (Lentinula edodes) — Gourmet & medicinal
- **Reishi / Ganoderma Spawn** (Ganoderma lucidum) — Medicinal mushroom
- **Lion's Mane Spawn** (Hericium erinaceus) — Premium medicinal & gourmet
- **Cordyceps Militaris Spawn** — High-value medicinal mushroom
- **Enoki Mushroom Spawn** (Flammulina velutipes)
- **Maitake Mushroom Spawn** (Grifola frondosa)
- **King Oyster Spawn** (Pleurotus eryngii)
- **Straw Mushroom Spawn** (Volvariella volvacea)
- **Paddy Straw Mushroom Spawn**

**Available:** 200g, 400g, 1kg, 5kg, bulk (10kg+)  
**Supply:** Pan India, Nepal, Bhutan, Bangladesh  
**Order:** https://organicmushroomfarm.shop

---

### 🍄 Fresh Mushrooms — All Varieties (Bulk & Retail)

Available fresh mushrooms for direct purchase, bulk orders, retail supply, restaurant supply, and export:

- Fresh Oyster Mushroom (White, Pink, Grey)
- Fresh Button Mushroom
- Fresh Milky Mushroom
- Fresh Shiitake Mushroom
- Fresh Lion's Mane Mushroom
- Fresh King Oyster Mushroom
- Fresh Enoki Mushroom

**Supply:** Pan India — Delhi, Mumbai, Bangalore, Chennai, Hyderabad, Pune, Kolkata, Ahmedabad, Jaipur, Lucknow, Bhopal, Indore, Jabalpur, Nagpur, Surat, Chandigarh, Patna, Ranchi, Bhubaneswar, Visakhapatnam, Kochi, Coimbatore, and all cities/towns/villages.  
**International:** UAE (Dubai, Abu Dhabi), UK (London), USA, Canada  
**Minimum Order:** 5kg (bulk) | 500g (retail)

---

### 🌿 Dry Mushrooms — All Varieties (Bulk & Retail)

Premium quality sun-dried and dehydrated mushrooms for wholesale, export, and retail:

- Dry Oyster Mushroom (White, Pink, Grey)
- Dry Shiitake Mushroom — Whole & Sliced
- Dry Milky Mushroom
- Dry Button Mushroom
- Dry Reishi / Ganoderma Mushroom (Whole, Sliced, Powder)
- Dry Lion's Mane Mushroom
- Dry Cordyceps Militaris
- Mushroom Powder — Reishi, Lion's Mane, Shiitake, Oyster, Cordyceps

**Supply:** Pan India & International (UAE, UK, USA, Canada, Europe, Southeast Asia)  
**Packaging:** Food-grade vacuum packs, 100g, 250g, 500g, 1kg, bulk 10kg+

---

### 📚 Mushroom Farming Training

Complete mushroom cultivation training for beginners, homegrowers, and commercial farmers:

**Varieties Covered:**
- Oyster Mushroom Cultivation Training
- Button Mushroom Cultivation Training
- Milky Mushroom Cultivation Training
- Shiitake Mushroom Cultivation Training
- Reishi / Ganoderma Mushroom Training
- Lion's Mane Mushroom Training
- Cordyceps Militaris Cultivation Training
- All-in-One Mushroom Cultivation Course

**Training Modes:**
- Online Training (Video, Live Sessions, WhatsApp Support)
- Offline Training — Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh (Hands-on practical)
- On-site Training at client's farm location

**Topics Covered:**
- Substrate preparation (Paddy straw, Wheat straw, Sawdust, Cotton waste)
- Sterilization and pasteurization methods
- Spawn inoculation techniques
- Incubation and fruiting management
- Humidity, temperature, and ventilation control
- Pest and disease management
- Harvesting, post-harvest, packaging
- Mushroom business and marketing
- Mushroom value-added products (powder, pickle, tincture, extract)

**Certification:** Yes — Certificate provided on course completion  
**Language:** Hindi & English  
**Contact:** +91 9203544140 | https://organicmushroomfarm.shop

---

### 🏗️ Mushroom Farm Setup (Turnkey)

Complete end-to-end mushroom farm setup service:

- Farm design and planning
- Site selection consultation
- Infrastructure setup (growing rooms, humidity chambers)
- Equipment procurement and installation
- Spawn supply for first batch
- Training and operational handholding
- Cold storage setup guidance
- Commercial mushroom farm setup
- Small-scale home mushroom farm setup
- Community / SHG mushroom farm setup

**Service Areas:** All India — Madhya Pradesh, Maharashtra, Rajasthan, Uttar Pradesh, Bihar, Chhattisgarh, Gujarat, Karnataka, Andhra Pradesh, Telangana, Tamil Nadu, West Bengal, Punjab, Haryana, Odisha, Jharkhand, Uttarakhand, Himachal Pradesh, Assam, Kerala, Goa, J&K, and all states.  
**International:** Bangladesh, Nepal, Bhutan, Southeast Asia

## Corporate & Technical Profile

> **Brand:** Organic Mushroom Farm™
> **Founder & Lead Expert:** Tanish Soni
> **Email:** support@mushroomtraining.online
> **Phone / WhatsApp:** +91 9203544140
> **Category:** Agri-tech / Mushroom Farming Training / EPC Contractor

Organic Mushroom Farm is India's specialized mushroom farming consultancy and training provider. Founded and led by Tanish Soni, we operate with a mission to professionalize mushroom cultivation through technology, climate-controlled farming, and expert training.

### Core Services & Technical Capabilities

- **Turnkey Mushroom Farm Setup:** Design and construction of climate-controlled rooms for Button, Oyster, Milky, and Shiitake.
- **Commercial Grow Room Models:** 18x30 ft, 18x40 ft, 18x60 ft, and 18x70 ft climate-controlled units.
- **Infrastructure & Equipment:** Specialized in utilizing high-grade PPGL PUF panels for superior corrosion resistance, Daikin refrigeration systems, custom HVAC, humidification systems, comprehensive racking, and advanced climate controllers.
- **Mushroom Spawn (Seed) Supply:** High-yield spawn for Oyster, Button, Milky, Shiitake, Reishi, Lion’s Mane, Cordyceps, and King Oyster.
- **Professional Commercial Training:** Online and offline courses covering cultivation cycles, sterilization, spawn run, fruiting condition management, and disease control.
- **Project Consultancy & Subsidies:** DPR (Detailed Project Report) preparation for bank loans and complete Government Subsidy guidance (NHB, MIDH, NABARD).

### Production Metrics & Yield
- **Average Yield:** Approx. 2kg per bag for Button mushrooms.
- **Crop Cycle:** Typical 45-day growth cycles enabling 6-7 rotations annually.
- **Logistics:** Pan-India delivery of spawn and equipment logistics.
- **International Expansion:** Active export and consultancy services for the UAE, USA, Canada, Nepal, Bhutan, Bangladesh, and Southeast Asia.

### FAQ Highlights
- **How to start?** We provide a complete roadmap from beginner training to full commercial farm setup.
- **Is there a subsidy?** Yes, we assist with NHB and state-level subsidy documentation and compliance.
- **What about marketing?** We provide commercial guidance on selling fresh and dry mushrooms to B2B wholesalers, local markets, and exporters.

---

## 💎 Value Addition (New Sections)
### 💰 Pricing Clarity
- **Mushroom Farming Masterclass:** Starting at just ₹299 (Online).
- **Commercial Training & Consultancy:** Custom pricing based on variety and scale.
- **Farm Setup:** Transparent, tiered pricing for climate-controlled units (18x30 to 18x70 ft).

### 🚀 USP (Unique Selling Proposition)
- **G1 Premium Quality:** We provide only first-generation, high-yield, contamination-free spawn.
- **End-to-End Ecosystem:** Unlike others, we don't just sell seeds; we provide the tech, the training, and the market guidance to ensure your success.
- **Tech-Driven Cultivation:** Use of advanced HVAC, PPGL PUF panels, and automated climate controllers for 365-day production.

### 🌟 Social Proof
- **Pan-India Presence:** Trusted by thousands of farmers across all 28 states and 8 UTs.
- **Global Reach:** Active supply chain and consultancy services in the USA, UAE, UK, and South Asia.
- **Expert Leadership:** Led by Tanish Soni, specializing in climate-controlled mushroom infrastructure and agri-tech innovation.

### 🤖 Agri-Tech Innovation
- **Automated Learning:** 4:00 PM Daily Simulated Live Webinars for consistent, high-quality training across time zones.
- **AI-Enabled Support:** Integrating AI-driven assistance to help farmers troubleshoot crop issues in real-time.
- **Digital-First Approach:** High-performance web platform (Next.js & Supabase) for seamless spawn ordering and course access.
